abstract: Complete playbook to scale a mobile app from 0 to $25k/month — covers app selection, all 4 distribution channels (content, influencers, UGC, paid ads), high-converting onboarding design, and scaling strategy.

source_article.title: This is how I scaled my mobile app to $25k+/month (The Complete Guide)
source_article.author: @maubaron

references.context: Co-builder, influencer deal structure, slideshows expert
Creator of Pray Screen app (Prayer Lock inspiration)
Jack Friks Method content format creator
